description: Composition Multicoloured printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, sleeveless, has a V-neck, decorative placket and full flared skirt Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water After washing, wring out excess water, twist garment, fasten with an elastic to band and leave to dry still twisted Do not bleach This hand crinkled kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the sleeveless shape, will keep you cool in warm weather. The bright print will lift your mood while the sweet rickrack embellishments and full skirt keep you looking feminine. Wear this kurta over tights or leggings depending on the occasion and dress it up with bright ethnic jewellery. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
